mnemonics.title: IKE Phases
mnemonics.content: IKE Phase 1: Main Mode (6 steps) = MARRKU (Mode, Auth, Rand, Rand, Key, User)

mnemonics.title: ESP vs AH
mnemonics.content: ESP = Encrypt Stuff Properly, AH = Authenticate Headers

acronyms.usage: Ensures session keys aren't compromised long-term

visualTips.visualization: Imagine wrapping entire IP packet in new encrypted envelope
Picture adding security headers to original packet like adding armor

analogies.analogy: Like a secure diplomatic pouch between embassies - contents protected end-to-end
